note: Mathlib/NumberTheory/ArithmeticFunction/Misc.lean:259-267 — Ω(n), notated `Ω` (scoped ArithmeticFunction.Omega), = n.primeFactorsList.length, i.e. number of prime factors with multiplicity; this is the 'big omega' half of the Wikipedia 'Prime omega function' article.

Mathlib/NumberTheory/ArithmeticFunction/Misc.lean:324-328 — ω(n), notated `ω` (scoped ArithmeticFunction.omega), = n.primeFactorsList.dedup.length, i.e. number of distinct prime factors; the 'little omega' half of the same Wikipedia article.
Mathlib/GroupTheory/SpecificGroups/Dihedral.lean:33 — `inductive DihedralGroup (n : ℕ) : Type`, the dihedral group of order 2n (r i / sr i constructors); direct formalization of the concept.

Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph/Diam.lean:434 — `def center (G : SimpleGraph α) : Set α` = set of vertices with eccentricity equal to the graph's radius; exactly the graph-theoretic 'center' concept.

Mathlib/Combinatorics/Additive/Corner/Roth.lean:164 — 'Roth's theorem for ℕ': a subset of {0,…,n-1} of density ≥ ε contains a nontrivial 3-term AP once n is large enough; the classical Roth's theorem on 3-APs.
